CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Steven B. Mains, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CAFFE MACARONI, INC., a corportion; STEPHANIE ASCIONE; MARIO ASCIONE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $100,026.07
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $100,026.07
Judgment signed in open court. Judgment will be filed and entered after counsel obtains Nunc Pro Tunc Order correcting Complaint to reflect Defendant's correct name as CAFFE MACARONI, INC., a corporation, so that judgment can be entered against Defendant with the correct spelling.
Counsel to provide a copy of the Order Correcting Complaint after is signed and process by the Law and Motion Department for clerk of this department to enter judgment.
